xmlns:http="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/http/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" <xs:include schemaLocation="https://istsvs0010:8181/ForibaESmmServices/ForibaESmmServicesPortImplBean?xsd=1"/> <xs:include schemaLocation="https://istsvs0010:8181/ForibaESmmServices/ForibaESmmServicesPortImplBean?xsd=2"/> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="sendDocumentRequestMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:sendDocumentRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="sendDocumentResponseMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:sendDocumentResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="sendDocumentFaultMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:ProcessingFault"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getDocumentRequestMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:getDocumentRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getDocumentResponseMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:getDocumentResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getDocumentFaultMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:ProcessingFault"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getReportListRequestMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:getReportListRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getReportListResponseMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:getReportListResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getReportListFaultMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:ProcessingFault"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getReportDataRequestMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:getReportDataRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getReportDataResponseMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:getReportDataResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getReportDataFaultMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:ProcessingFault"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="cancelDocumentRequestMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:cancelDocumentRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="cancelDocumentResponseMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:cancelDocumentResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="cancelDocumentFaultMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:ProcessingFault"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="actionServiceRequestMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:actionServiceRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="actionServiceResponseMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:actionServiceResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="actionServiceFaultMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameter" element="tns:ProcessingFault"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="ForibaESmmServicesPort"> <wsdl:operation name="sendDocument"> <wsdl:input message="tns:sendDocumentRequestMessage"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:sendDocumentResponseMessage"/> <wsdl:fault name="sendDocumentFault" message="tns:sendDocumentFaultMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getDocument"> <wsdl:input message="tns:getDocumentRequestMessage"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:getDocumentResponseMessage"/> <wsdl:fault name="getDocumentFault" message="tns:getDocumentFaultMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="actionService"> <wsdl:input message="tns:actionServiceRequestMessage"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:actionServiceResponseMessage"/> <wsdl:fault name="actionServiceFault" message="tns:actionServiceFaultMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getReportList"> <wsdl:input message="tns:getReportListRequestMessage"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:getReportListResponseMessage"/> <wsdl:fault name="getReportListFault" message="tns:getReportListFaultMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getReportData"> <wsdl:input message="tns:getReportDataRequestMessage"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:getReportDataResponseMessage"/> <wsdl:fault name="getReportDataFault" message="tns:getReportDataFaultMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="cancelDocument"> <wsdl:input message="tns:cancelDocumentRequestMessage"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:cancelDocumentResponseMessage"/> <wsdl:fault name="cancelDocumentFault" message="tns:cancelDocumentFaultMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="ForibaESmmServicesBinding" type="tns:ForibaESmmServicesPort"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="sendDocument"> <soap:operation soapAction="sendDocument"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="sendDocumentFault"> <soap:fault name="sendDocumentFault" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getDocument"> <soap:operation soapAction="getDocument"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="getDocumentFault"> <soap:fault name="getDocumentFault" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="actionService"> <soap:operation soapAction="actionService"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="actionServiceFault"> <soap:fault name="actionServiceFault" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getReportList"> <soap:operation soapAction="getReportList"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> <wsdl:fault name="getReportListFault"> <soap:fault name="getReportListFault" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getReportData"> <soap:operation name="getReportDataFault" use="literal"/> </wsdl:fault> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="cancelDocument"> <soap:operation soapAction="cancelDocument"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="ForibaESmmServices"> <wsdl:port name="ForibaESmmServicesPort" binding="tns:ForibaESmmServicesBinding"> <soap:address location="https://istsvs0010:8181/ForibaESmmServices/ForibaESmmServicesPortImplBean"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
